description: Click on a top header navigation link (desktop or mobile drawer).
Mobile hamburger menu opened or closed.
Click on any link in the site footer (nav duplicate, social icon, raw DB download, author byline).
Navigation to a /president/<slug> page from a list or table row.
Click on a homepage newswire row to open a pardon detail.
Homepage newswire 'View all recent →' CTA.
Homepage restitution leaderboard row click.
Click on an offense-category row (homepage breakdown or president page composition).
CTA that links to the search page from the homepage source band or a president page.
Pardon detail page mounted (acts as the canonical detail-view event).
Click on the linked DOJ warrant PDF on a pardon detail page.
Prev/next pagination between pardon detail pages within an administration.
Prev/next pagination between president pages chronologically.
Sortable column header click on the all-presidents comparison table.
Recent feed 'Load older' button revealed the next month group.
Click on a row in the recent feed (excludes the inner president-link click).
Click on a recipient name chip inside the Timeline component (currently rendered on president pages).
Debounced fire after the user types in the search box and matches > 0 (debounce 600ms).
Search type dropdown changed to pardon or commutation.
Search category dropdown changed; fires once for the unset of the prior value and once for the new value.
Search president dropdown changed to a non-'all' value.
Click on a result row in the search results table.
Filters cleared via the 'Clear all' button or by removing an individual pill.
Search results pagination — prev, next, or page-number button.
Uncaught JS error or unhandled promise rejection captured globally. Forwarded via posthog.captureException from window error/unhandledrejection listeners; also enabled by autocapture defaults.
